channel.title: Events on Da Nang Language Exchange Club
channel.description: Recent content in Events on Da Nang Language Exchange Club

item.title: Friday Cafe Language Exchange
item.description: A structured Friday night session with English and Vietnamese practice, small-group rotations, and a food topic page built around three reusable conversation patterns.

item.title: Coffee and Introductions Night
item.description: A beginner-friendly session focused on introductions, routines, and hometown stories, with a particularly strong mix of first-time attendees.

item.title: Da Nang Street Food Session
item.description: A lively but still structured cafe session centered on Da Nang food culture, recommendation sharing, and practical ordering vocabulary.
